title: Arthur Cameron – Karatoya Square Seagrass Basket with Tapered Base – Handcrafted Square Storage Basket with Handles, Decorative Woven Organiser for Stylish Home Storage & Display (Medium)
features: HANDCRAFTED SEAGRASS BASKET: Expertly woven from natural seagrass by skilled artisans in Bangladesh, this seagrass basket offers a perfect balance of durability and style. The organic texture and two-tone weave make it a versatile addition to any room.

FUNCTIONAL SQUARE STORAGE BASKET WITH HANDLES: Designed with sturdy external handles, this square storage basket with handles is easy to lift and move, even when full. Ideal for storing linens, toys, magazines, or everyday essentials around the home.

DECORATIVE WOVEN ORGANISER FOR ANY ROOM: More than just storage, this decorative woven organiser elevates your space with its sculptural tapered base and refined geometric shape. Perfect for living rooms, bedrooms, bathrooms, or entryways.

LIGHTWEIGHT YET DURABLE DESIGN: This artisan-made basket is strong enough for daily use while remaining lightweight for easy portability. Its reinforced structure ensures it keeps its shape over time without losing its handcrafted charm.

AVAILABLE IN THREE PRACTICAL SIZES: Choose from Small (23x23x25cm), Medium (28x28x26cm), or Large (33x33x31cm) to suit your storage needs. Use individually or as a set for a layered, coordinated storage solution throughout your home.
description: Product Description Seagrass Collection Bring nature indoors with our seagrass baskets. Naturally durable, endlessly versatile and beautifully woven, they're ideal for organising belongings, decorating living spaces and blending practical use with natural charm. From cosy corners to modern spaces, our seagrass baskets fit every lifestyle. Previous page Built to last Durable fibre for daily use Seagrass is dense yet flexible, creating baskets strong enough for daily use but always beautiful Nature - Conscious fibre Grows back season after season Seagrass grows fast in coastal waters, regenerating quickly and making it a truly natural choice Nature Aligned Protects coasts and nature Seagrass stabilises soil, prevents erosion and supports coastal ecosystems Fits every home Rustic to modern style From large hampers to decorative trays, seagrass adapts to any style, rustic or contemporary Unique character Warm tones, organic charm Each basket has subtle variations in tone and weave, ensuring every piece feels truly one of a kind Next page 1 Natural Strength 2 Renewable Choice 3 Eco Benefits 4 Versatile Design 5 Natural Beauty Strong, Stylish, and Kind to the Earth Seagrass is a natural fibre chosen for its strength, flexibility, and beauty Dense yet pliable, seagrass creates baskets that withstand daily use while its natural tones and textures bring rustic, earthy charm to interiors, making each piece as visually appealing as it is practical. Growing quickly in coastal waters, it regenerates without harming nature. By stabilising soil and protecting shorelines, seagrass stands out as a sustainable, planet-friendly choice for durable and stylish storage. Organically Sourced, Beautifully Made Our seagrass is naturally sourced from the southern coastal districts of Bangladesh, such as Noakhali and Bhola. After harvest, the leaves are carefully sun-dried, twisted into ropes, and inspected for quality, ensuring strength and consistency while embracing subtle natural variations in colour. Skilled artisans then handweave these ropes into beautiful baskets, with larger pieces reinforced by metal frames for durability. Depending on the design, ropes may be bleached or coloured, which adds authenticity to every piece. Meanwhile, locally sourced metal and fabric are finished in-house to ensure lasting quality and style. Atrai Laundry Basket Your Basket, Your Style Multiple Sizes Removable Liner With Lid Multi - Purpose Nestable Storage Built in Handles Multiple Sizes Removable Liner With Lid Multi - Purpose Nestable Storage Built in Handles Multiple Sizes Removable Liner With Lid Multi - Purpose Nestable Storage Built in Handles Multiple Sizes Removable Liner With Lid Multi - Purpose Nestable Storage Built in Handles Previous page Banar Basket Learn More Haora Basket Learn More Bhadra Tray Learn More Bangali Basket Learn More Next page Are they strong enough for daily use? Yes! The tight weaving and sturdy construction make them perfect for everyday storage — from blankets and toys to laundry and household items. Do the baskets have a liner? Some designs include removable cotton liners, while others are left unlined for a natural finish. Check individual product details for specifics. Can I use these baskets in the bathroom? Yes — but as seagrass is a natural fibre, we recommend keeping them in well-ventilated bathrooms or pairing them with a liner to protect against damp. Are the baskets handmade? Absolutely. Each piece is crafted by skilled artisans, meaning every basket is unique with its own natural variations in colour and weave. What styles are available? Our Seagrass Collection includes a variety of weaving techniques — from tight plain weave to open lattice and twisted cord — and comes in a range of shapes (round, oval, square, tapered) and sizes to suit every space and storage need.
